              "<Figure size 1200x600 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "# =========================================================\n",
        "# LEO/USD, XLM/USD & BTC/USD Regression: Paper-Ready LSTM + Stacked Linear Regression\n",
        "# =========================================================\n",
        "\n",
        "import yfinance as yf\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import MinMaxScaler\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, r2_score\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression\n",
        "import torch\n",
        "import torch.nn as nn\n",
        "import torch.optim as optim\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "\n",
        "# -----------------------------\n",
        "# 1. Loop over cryptocurrencies\n",
        "# -----------------------------\n",
        "tickers = [\"LEO-USD\", \"XLM-USD\",\"BTC-USD\"]\n",
        "\n",
        "# Store predictions for multi-coin comparison\n",
        "multi_coin_preds = {}\n",
        "\n",
        "for ticker in tickers:\n",
        "    print(f\"\\n=== Forecasting for {ticker} ===\\n\")\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Load Data\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    df = yf.download(ticker, start=\"2020-01-01\", end=\"2026-01-01\")[['Open','High','Low','Close','Volume']].dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Feature Engineering: MA, Volatility, Returns\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    df['Return'] = df['Close'].pct_change().fillna(0)\n",
        "    df['MA_10'] = df['Close'].rolling(10).mean().fillna(method='bfill')\n",
        "    df['MA_20'] = df['Close'].rolling(20).mean().fillna(method='bfill')\n",
        "    df['Volatility'] = df['Return'].rolling(10).std().fillna(method='bfill')\n",
        "    df['Target'] = df['Close'].shift(-1)\n",
        "    df.dropna(inplace=True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    features = ['Open','High','Low','Close','Volume','MA_10','MA_20','Volatility']\n",
        "    scaler_X = MinMaxScaler()\n",
        "    scaler_y = MinMaxScaler()\n",
        "    X = scaler_X.fit_transform(df[features])\n",
        "    y = scaler_y.fit_transform(df[['Target']])\n",
        "\n",
        "    X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, y, test_size=0.2, shuffle=False)\n",
        "    X_train_t, X_test_t = torch.tensor(X_train,dtype=torch.float32), torch.tensor(X_test,dtype=torch.float32)\n",
        "    y_train_t, y_test_t = torch.tensor(y_train,dtype=torch.float32), torch.tensor(y_test,dtype=torch.float32)\n",
        "    y_true = scaler_y.inverse_transform(y_test)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # LSTM Model\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    class LSTMRegressor(nn.Module):\n",
        "        def __init__(self,input_dim,hidden_dim=64,num_layers=2):\n",
        "            super().__init__()\n",
        "            self.lstm = nn.LSTM(input_dim,hidden_dim,num_layers,batch_first=True)\n",
        "            self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim,1)\n",
        "        def forward(self,x):\n",
        "            x = x.unsqueeze(1)\n",
        "            out,_ = self.lstm(x)\n",
        "            out = out[:,-1,:]\n",
        "            return self.fc(out)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # AR-Adam Optimizer\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    from torch.optim import Optimizer\n",
        "    class AdamRegression(Optimizer):\n",
        "        def __init__(self, params, lr=1e-3, betas=(0.9,0.999), alpha=0.9, gamma=0.95, eps=1e-8, k=0.05):\n",
        "            defaults = dict(lr=lr, betas=betas, alpha=alpha, gamma=gamma, eps=eps, k=k)\n",
        "            super().__init__(params,defaults)\n",
        "        @torch.no_grad()\n",
        "        def step(self, volatility=None):\n",
        "            for group in self.param_groups:\n",
        "                for p in group['params']:\n",
        "                    if p.grad is None: continue\n",
        "                    grad = p.grad\n",
        "                    state = self.state[p]\n",
        "                    if len(state)==0:\n",
        "                        state['step']=0\n",
        "                        state['m']=torch.zeros_like(p)\n",
        "                        state['v']=torch.zeros_like(p)\n",
        "                    m,v = state['m'], state['v']\n",
        "                    beta1,beta2 = group['betas']\n",
        "                    m.mul_(beta1).add_(grad, alpha=(1-beta1)**group['alpha'])\n",
        "                    v.mul_(beta2).addcmul_(grad,grad,value=1-beta2)\n",
        "                    state['step']+=1\n",
        "                    step=state['step']\n",
        "                    m_hat = m/(1-beta1**(step**group['gamma']))\n",
        "                    v_hat = v/(1-beta2**step)\n",
        "                    eta = group['lr']\n",
        "                    if volatility is not None:\n",
        "                        eta = eta/(1+group['k']*volatility)\n",
        "                    p.addcdiv_(m_hat,v_hat.sqrt()+group['eps'],value=-eta)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Hyperparameters\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    hidden_dims=[64,128]\n",
        "    layers_list=[2]\n",
        "    lrs=[0.001,0.003]\n",
        "    epochs_list=[50]\n",
        "    optimizers_list=['Adam','RAdam','NAdam','AR-Adam']\n",
        "\n",
        "    results_list=[]\n",
        "    all_preds={}\n",
        "    optimizer_loss_histories={}\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Training Loop with Optimizer Comparison\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    for opt in optimizers_list:\n",
        "        best_mse=float('inf')\n",
        "        best_pred=None\n",
        "        best_model=None\n",
        "        optimizer_loss_histories[opt]=[]\n",
        "        for hidden in hidden_dims:\n",
        "            for layers in layers_list:\n",
        "                for lr in lrs:\n",
        "                    for epochs in epochs_list:\n",
        "                        model=LSTMRegressor(X_train.shape[1],hidden_dim=hidden,num_layers=layers)\n",
        "                        criterion=nn.MSELoss()\n",
        "                        if opt=='Adam': optimizer_obj=optim.Adam(model.parameters(),lr=lr)\n",
        "                        elif opt=='RAdam': optimizer_obj=optim.RAdam(model.parameters(),lr=lr)\n",
        "                        elif opt=='NAdam': optimizer_obj=optim.NAdam(model.parameters(),lr=lr)\n",
        "                        elif opt=='AR-Adam': optimizer_obj=AdamRegression(model.parameters(),lr=lr)\n",
        "                        vol_train = torch.tensor(df['Volatility'].values[:len(X_train)],dtype=torch.float32).view(-1,1)\n",
        "                        for epoch in range(epochs):\n",
        "                            model.train()\n",
        "                            optimizer_obj.zero_grad()\n",
        "                            loss=(criterion(model(X_train_t),y_train_t)*(1+vol_train.mean())).mean()\n",
        "                            loss.backward()\n",
        "                            if opt=='AR-Adam': optimizer_obj.step(volatility=vol_train.mean())\n",
        "                            else: optimizer_obj.step()\n",
        "                            optimizer_loss_histories[opt].append(loss.item())\n",
        "                        # Evaluation\n",
        "                        model.eval()\n",
        "                        with torch.no_grad():\n",
        "                            y_pred_scaled=model(X_test_t).numpy()\n",
        "                            y_pred=scaler_y.inverse_transform(y_pred_scaled)\n",
        "                        mse_val=mean_squared_error(y_true,y_pred)\n",
        "                        if mse_val<best_mse:\n",
        "                            best_mse=mse_val\n",
        "                            best_pred=y_pred\n",
        "                            best_model=model\n",
        "\n",
        "        all_preds[f'Normal_{opt}']=best_pred\n",
        "        dir_acc = np.mean(np.sign(y_true[1:]-y_true[:-1])==np.sign(best_pred[1:]-best_pred[:-1]))\n",
        "        results_list.append({'Type':'Normal LSTM','Optimizer':opt,'MSE':best_mse,'MAE':mean_absolute_error(y_true,best_pred),'R2':r2_score(y_true,best_pred),'DirectionalAcc':dir_acc})\n",
        "\n",
        "        # -----------------------------\n",
        "        # Stacked LSTM + Linear Regression\n",
        "        # -----------------------------\n",
        "        y_pred_train=scaler_y.inverse_transform(best_model(X_train_t).detach().numpy())\n",
        "        X_train_stack=np.hstack([X_train,y_pred_train])\n",
        "        X_test_stack=np.hstack([X_test,best_pred])\n",
        "        stacked_model=LinearRegression()\n",
        "        stacked_model.fit(X_train_stack,y_train)\n",
        "        stacked_pred_scaled=stacked_model.predict(X_test_stack)\n",
        "        stacked_pred=scaler_y.inverse_transform(stacked_pred_scaled.reshape(-1,1))\n",
        "        all_preds[f'Stacked_{opt}']=stacked_pred\n",
        "        dir_acc_stack = np.mean(np.sign(y_true[1:]-y_true[:-1])==np.sign(stacked_pred[1:]-stacked_pred[:-1]))\n",
        "        results_list.append({'Type':'Stacked LSTM','Optimizer':opt,'MSE':mean_squared_error(y_true,stacked_pred),'MAE':mean_absolute_error(y_true,stacked_pred),'R2':r2_score(y_true,stacked_pred),'DirectionalAcc':dir_acc_stack})\n",
        "\n",
        "    multi_coin_preds[ticker]=all_preds  # store for multi-coin plots\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Results Table\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    df_results=pd.DataFrame(results_list).sort_values('MSE')\n",
        "    print(df_results)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Plot: True vs Predictions\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "    for opt in optimizers_list:\n",
        "        plt.plot(all_preds[f'Normal_{opt}'], label=f'Normal LSTM {opt}', linestyle='--')\n",
        "        plt.plot(all_preds[f'Stacked_{opt}'], label=f'Stacked LSTM {opt}')\n",
        "    plt.plot(y_true, label='True Price', color='black', linewidth=2)\n",
        "    plt.title(f'{ticker}: LSTM vs Stacked LSTM Predictions')\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Price')\n",
        "    plt.legend()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Residuals & Histogram\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))\n",
        "    for opt in optimizers_list:\n",
        "        residuals = y_true.flatten() - all_preds[f'Stacked_{opt}'].flatten()\n",

        "    plt.ylabel('Residual')\n",
        "    plt.legend()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))\n",
        "    plt.hist(residuals, bins=50, color='salmon', edgecolor='black')\n",
        "    plt.title(f'{ticker}: Residual Distribution (Stacked AR-Adam)')\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Residual')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Frequency')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    # Rolling MSE\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",
        "    rolling_mse = pd.Series(residuals**2).rolling(20).mean()\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))\n",
        "    plt.plot(rolling_mse, color='blue')\n",
        "    plt.title(f'{ticker}: Rolling MSE (Window=20)')\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Time')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('MSE')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",

        "    plt.scatter(df['Volatility'].values[-len(residuals):], residuals, alpha=0.5)\n",
        "    plt.title(f'{ticker}: Residuals vs Volatility')\n",
        "    plt.xlabel('Volatility')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Residual')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "    # -----------------------------\n",

        "    # -----------------------------\n",

        "    plt.scatter(y_true, stacked_pred, alpha=0.5)\n",

        "    plt.xlabel('True Price')\n",
        "    plt.ylabel('Predicted Price')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
